stem: Reyes spent 25% of his 6-hour shift answering customer emails. How many minutes of his shift did he spend answering emails?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. 6 hours equals 6 × 60 = 360 minutes. 25% of 360 minutes is 0.25 × 360 = 90 minutes.

Choice A is incorrect. This is 25% of 6, treating the time in hours rather than converting to minutes.

Choice B is incorrect. This is just the percentage value, not applied to the total minutes.

Choice D is incorrect. This is the number of minutes spent NOT on emails (75% of the shift).
